name: The American Farm
overview: “The American Farm” is an authentic portrait of the fight to go from seed to stalk, and from farm to fork. The HISTORY series presents an up-close look at one full year of family farming, told through an unprecedented year on the ground, capturing breathtaking visuals, private moments and personal interviews.

trailers.title: The American Farm: Caring for the Land | New Series | Premieres Thursday April 4th 10/9c | HISTORY
